title: AdverseEvent
description: An adverse event. Maps to SDTM domain AE (Adverse Events).

ae_id.description: Unique identifier for the adverse event.

visit_id.description: Foreign key to the Visit at which AE was reported.

ae_sequence.description: Sequence number for the AE per subject. CDISC AE variable: AESEQ.

term.description: Verbatim adverse event term. CDISC AE variable: AETERM.

meddra_code.description: MedDRA code for the AE. CDISC AE variable: AEDECOD (PT code).

meddra_soc.description: MedDRA System Organ Class. CDISC AE variable: AEBODSYS.

severity.description: AE severity grade. CDISC AE variable: AESEV.

seriousness.description: Whether the AE meets SAE criteria. CDISC AE variable: AESER.

causality.description: Relationship to study drug. CDISC AE variable: AEREL.

outcome.description: AE outcome. CDISC AE variable: AEOUT.

action_taken.description: Action taken with study drug. CDISC AE variable: AEACN.

start_date.description: AE onset date. CDISC AE variable: AESTDTC.

end_date.description: AE resolution date. CDISC AE variable: AEENDTC.

is_ongoing.description: Whether the AE is still ongoing at time of report.
